person.shortBio: Software developer with experience in backend and full stack development. Specialist in transforming complex requirements into scalable solutions, focused on database design and cloud deployment with Azure.
about: I'm a software developer with hands-on experience building and maintaining production systems in sectors like mining, electronic invoicing, and enterprise integration.
My focus is on backend development with NestJS and PostgreSQL, designing robust data models, scalable APIs, and ensuring system quality and stability.
I've worked closely with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, design solutions, and migrate legacy applications to modern platforms.
I'm comfortable working on both backend and full stack projects, with experience in Azure deployments, external service integration, and user support.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.summary: Responsible for backend development of a mining traceability application with NestJS and PostgreSQL on Azure.
bullets: Designed and implemented the backend of a mining traceability platform using NestJS and PostgreSQL deployed on Azure.
Led requirements gathering and data model design for the gold production lifecycle.
Ensured system quality, performance, and stability through testing and query optimization.
Supported migration of legacy applications to the new platform, ensuring data integrity.
Collaborated with frontend and operations teams to integrate complex business workflows.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.summary: Responsible for full stack development of a legacy application with Ruby on Rails, AngularJS, and PostgreSQL.
bullets: Maintained and evolved a legacy full stack application using Ruby on Rails, AngularJS, and PostgreSQL.
Designed and implemented integrations with DIAN for electronic invoicing.
Built a notification system to improve user communication.
Implemented scalable solutions ensuring data integrity.
Facilitated report generation in Tableau for business data analysis.

projects.name: Aurum Suite
projects.summary: A SaaS mining traceability platform for monitoring and managing gold processing across multiple sites.
projects.description: Backend system to digitize and centralize operational data across the gold production lifecycle. Supports laboratory processes, weighing, plant activities, and multi-site tracking.
highlights: Designed the backend architecture and data models with NestJS and PostgreSQL.
Implemented REST APIs for laboratory workflows, weighing, and plant operations.
Deployed the application on Azure with CI/CD pipelines.
Ensured traceability and data consistency for gold processing.

projects.name: Equimenta ERP
projects.summary: An electronic invoicing ERP system with DIAN integration for enterprise management.
projects.description: Legacy full stack application modernized to support electronic invoicing, inventory management, and business reporting.
highlights: Implemented DIAN integration for Colombian electronic invoicing.
Built notification system to improve user communication.
Designed Tableau reports for business data analysis.
Ensured data integrity and system scalability.
